component.name: RuntimeScene
component.script:
sub init() ' Mimics apps (e.g. a "RetryableComponentLibrary") that create the ' ComponentLibrary node at runtime and configure it in BrightScript code. m.lib = createObject("roSGNode", "ComponentLibrary") m.lib.observeField("loadStatus", "onLoadStatusChanged") m.lib.id = "RuntimeLib" print "after set id: " + m.lib.loadStatus m.lib.uri = "pkg:/library.zip" print "after set uri: " + m.lib.loadStatus end sub
sub onLoadStatusChanged() print "runtime loadStatus changed: " + m.lib.loadStatus if m.lib.loadStatus = "ready" ' Namespace comes from the library manifest, not the node id ("RuntimeLib"). bar = createObject("roSGNode", "MyComponentLib:Bar") print "runtime bar subtype: " + bar.subtype() end if end sub
